title: Ferny Spreading Blossom: batch 16 curation claim opened
body: Start-right live state found 0 active claims and 0 active commit intents before my claim. Opened claim 610b98fb for dedicated knowledge-curation batch 16 over the next five legacy backlog items. Scope is in-place item dispositions only: no archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
